title: Build a Landing Page for SaaS Startup
description: Modern responsive landing page with hero section, pricing table, testimonials, and CTA. Must be mobile-first and load under 2 seconds.

title: Smart Contract Security Audit
description: Full security audit of a Solana Anchor program (3 instructions, ~500 lines). Need vulnerability report with severity ratings.

title: Design NFT Collection — 10 Pieces
description: Create a cohesive 10-piece NFT art collection with consistent style. Include layered source files and metadata JSON.

title: Write Technical Documentation for SDK
description: Comprehensive docs for a TypeScript SDK: getting started, API reference, tutorials, deployment guide. Must include code examples.

title: Social Media Campaign — 30 Days
description: Plan and execute a 30-day Twitter/LinkedIn campaign for a Web3 project. Includes content calendar, graphics, and analytics.
